boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement release the near-threshold renewal?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Delegation matches vendor, term, ceiling, signature before release
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: DEL-WRE-077 authorizes exact match; STD-WRE-077-P confirms no committee review required
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defect; warning note does not override ceiling match

final_answer: Action may proceed. DEL-WRE-077 provides exact delegation authority matching vendor, 12-month term, and USD 50000 ceiling for the 49750 renewal, signed before release. STD-WRE-077-P confirms committee review is unnecessary below ceiling. WARN-WRE-077 note does not alter the closed boundary. Source records bind release as authorized.
